allow: PowerShell(try { $w = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/work" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; $err = if \($w.Content -match "Parsing ecmascript|Build Error"\) { "BUILD-ERROR" } else { "ok" }; $dariyaa = \([regex]::Matches\($w.Content, "instagram/dariyaa"\)\).Count; $bhooth = \([regex]::Matches\($w.Content, "instagram/bhooth"\)\).Count; $oldPlaceholder = if \($w.Content -match "Shark Tank|MasterChef|Prithvi Raj"\) { "OLD-STILL-THERE" } else { "old-removed" }; "work => $\($w.StatusCode\); $err; dariyaa_imgs=$dariyaa; bhooth_imgs=$bhooth; $oldPlaceholder" } catch { "work => DOWN/ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
